name: LLPM
summary: Markdown-based project management CLI for LLM multi-agent workflows
description: A stateless, markdown-based project management tool designed for LLM multi-agent workflows. Stores tickets as YAML-frontmatter markdown files, provides a full CLI for creating, listing, and managing tickets with dependencies and status tracking, and ships bundled Claude skills for PM, planner, and worker agent roles. Python 3.12+, PyYAML, built with UV.
